{{Infobox character
| name = Calan Archer
| aliases = Calan
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Therian Nills]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Goldsign|Goldsigns]], [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]], [[Ruler technique]], [[Striker technique]], [[soulfire]], lightning dragon}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Stormcallers]], [[Dreadgod cultist]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

''See also: [[Calan Archer Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Calan Archer is a muscular, sandy-haired member of the [[Stormcallers]], a cult dedicated to the [[Weeping Dragon]]. He is characterized by a square jaw, a facial scar, and scripted rings of blue-and-gold lightning around his biceps. As a practitioner of the [[Stormcallers]], he utilizes [[madra]] to fuel techniques such as his [[Ruler technique]] and the [[Harbinger of the Storm]], which summons a massive storm involving [[wind]], [[water]], and lightning. In combat, he has utilized [[Thousand-Mile Cloud{{!}}Thousand-Mile Clouds]] for mobility, though his abilities were eventually overcome by [[Yerin]]. Calan served as a teammate and sect brother to others, including [[Therian Nills{{!}}Therian]], and was involved in encounters with figures such as [[Reigan Shen]]. His life ended after being pierced by the [[flying sword]] [[Wavedancer]] following an encounter where his [[dragon]] [[spirit]] interacted with [[Akura Douji]]’s [[Remnant]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">22</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] is [[Therian Nills]]'s sect brother and team member.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] possesses [[Goldsign{{!}}Goldsigns]] that look like scripted rings of blue-gold lightning.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] is a member of the [[Stormcallers]] and possesses a [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer{{!}}Calan]] is a [[Dreadgod cultist]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] was meditating in his waiting room.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] is a participant in the arena battle against [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] stood opposite [[Calan Archer{{!}}Calan]] using her perception.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Storm madra]] gathered around [[Calan Archer{{!}}Calan]] when the barrier dropped.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] used a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to speed away.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer{{!}}Calan]] used a [[Ruler technique]] to spread a storm.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer{{!}}Calan]] used a second [[Striker technique]] that drilled a hole through the [[Blood Shadow]]'s hand.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer{{!}}Calan]] uses blades and can fight back against the [[Frozen Blade]] [[technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer{{!}}Calan]] used [[soulfire]] to push away an [[Archlord]]’s [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer{{!}}Calan]] has seven [[jade rings]] and a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is confident he can beat [[Calan Archer]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] is a person [[Lindon]] thought he could beat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] is a character whom [[Yerin]] faced while opening her eyes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] had seen [[Reigan Shen]] before.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] competed against [[Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] conjured a lightning [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]]'s [[dragon]] was feeding on a purple lightning [[spirit]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] was part of the group under the [[Sage of Red Faith]] that ambushed [[Mercy]] and [[Akura Pride{{!}}Pride]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
